feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Datasphere
feed.subtitle: SAP Datasphere Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Resolve ambigous field names in Datasphere SQL View
entry.content:
Hey Experts,

when joining different Views in Datasphere via graphical view the system automatically deactivates the same named fields which are available in both views. 

When building the sql view as far i know we don`t get the feature of automatically handling  this and I´m curious if anyone has a clue how to effectively resolve this issue. 

My approach was to copy the field list and let a short script run over it to detect duplicate field names and handle them with alias prefix or delete them directly from the output list. 

As this requires a manual step outside of Datasphere I´d like to know if anyone has a better way to do this or if I missed a built in functionality here?

Regards

Toni

entry.title: SAP Datasphere - Batch rename columns from CDS view
entry.content:
I frequently load new data from standard CDS-Views to SAP. Some of them have a large number of columns. Since our entire reporting is in German language, I always have to rename a large number of columns by hand to German.

Is there any way to speed up this process? Ideal would be that the column names would show in German language already when the data flow is created and the CDS-view is processed but I would be happy for any way to achieve some level of automization here.

Thanks!

entry.title: Help Needed: Connection Issue with Microsoft Azure SQL Server on SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm facing an issue while trying to establish a connection to Microsoft Azure SQL Server on SAP Datasphere. Here are the details:

Error Message:

You can check the error message on the image attached below

 

Steps Taken:

  1. Created a new connection in SAP Datasphere with the necessary details for Microsoft Azure SQL Server.
  2. Attempted to validate the connection but encountered the above error.
  3. Added the IP address of SAP Datasphere to the Azure SQL Server firewall to allow access.

Observations:

  • The error mentions "Cannot open server 'gmail.com'" which is confusing as I have provided the correct Azure SQL Server details.
  • The message also indicates "Invalid attribute in connection string: DriverUnicodeType."

Questions:

  1. Has anyone encountered a similar issue or can provide insights on what might be causing this error?
  2. What is the correct way to configure the connection string for Microsoft Azure SQL Server in SAP Datasphere?
  3. Are there any specific attributes or settings I need to ensure are correctly configured in the connection setup?

Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated. Thank you!

Best regards,
Dhairya Maradiya

entry.title: from which table do we get the payer name and sales rep name for the COPA customers in DSP?
Connecting BTP Fiori App to Azure SQL Database Without Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hello All,

I hope everyone is doing well!

I am currently working on a project where I need to connect my SAP BTP Fiori app to an Azure SQL database to push and pull data. However, I want to achieve this without using the Integration Suite.

Has anyone successfully established such a connection, and if so, could you please share the steps or provide any guidance on how to go about it?

Any help or pointers in the right direction would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!

Best regards, 

Dhairya Maradiya

entry.title: Establishing a Direct Connection Between SAP BTP Fiori App and Azure SQL Database
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I hope this message finds you well!

I am currently working on a project that involves connecting my SAP BTP Fiori app to an Azure SQL database for data exchange (push and pull). However, I aim to accomplish this without utilizing the Integration Suite.

Has anyone here managed to establish this type of connection? If so, could you kindly share the steps or any guidance on how to proceed?

Any help or direction would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!

Best regards,
Dhairya Maradiya

entry.title: Sales Cloud V2 Connection to Analytics Cloud and Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

How can Sales Cloud V2 be connected to Datasphere and Analytics Cloud?

The "classic" Sales Cloud provides standard OData APIs like "/sap/c4c/odata/v1/c4codataapi/" or "/sap/c4c/odata/analytics/ds/Codopph.svc" to extract all the needed Master Data and Business Objects such as Accounts, Leads, Opportunities, and Quotes.

How can V2 be connected to Datasphere and Analytics Cloud?

Best regards,
Joelle

entry.title: Automate csv files upload to Datasphere (dynamic filename)
entry.content:
Hi,

I have multiple csv in a SFTP location, all with same number of columns. The name of the csv files are based on the current month for example : File_2024_01.csv, File_2024_02.csv and so on. I want to automate this file load in datasphere, so that when data is requested by datasphere, it only picks up the current month file.

Additionally, Is there any way to load all of the csv inside a folder/location to datasphere?

SAP Datasphere 

Regards,

Arpan

entry.title: Customer moving to datasphere from SLT, missing filtering options to reduce the data on calls
entry.content:
Hi All, I have a customer question I was hoping to clarify here.

The customer is currently trying to move from SLT to Datasphere. They see a few shortfalls to what they could do in SLT and were wondering if there was anything planned or a work round.

 

The main issue: They don’t have the ability to customize the filters like before, in their SLT job. They need the datasphere pulls developed with open filter ranges. Is this something that will be coming soon? Is there a work around?

entry.title: Help Needed Enabling Data Builder in SAP Data Sphere
entry.content:
I've recently created a new SAP Data Sphere tenant and need assistance enabling Data Builder and Business Builder in SAP Data Sphere.
Could someone guide me through the steps or configuration required to enable for my tenant?

Thank you 

Priyanka 

Thank  you

entry.title: can I connect SAP Datasphere to Priority Software?
entry.content:
Hey, 
Can Priority Software (ERP) can be connected directly to SAP Datasphere?
Thank you

entry.title: Can SAP PAPM run on SAP Datasphere Only?
entry.content:
Hello,
Can SAP PAPM run on SAP Datasphere Only?
(if the company haven't SAP Hana or others SAP technologies)

entry.title: How to enable realtime delta load in SAP Datasphere for SAPI datasources
entry.content:
I’m interested in real-time delta load. But I found out that the KBA is not available.

SAP Datasphere
Best Practices and Troubleshooting

Connectivity & Data Integration
3264491 - How to enable realtime delta load in SAP Datasphere for SAPI datasources

You are not entitled for SAP Note/KBA 3264491

entry.title: Is there a way to Loading SAP BW hierarchy to Datashpere ?
entry.content:
Hey Specs 


Is there a way to load SAP BW hierarchies to SAP datashpere ?

I am trying to find standard way to load hiearchies already generated in BW to SAP datashpere ?

Is there any standard way apart from trying to build up everything from the hierarchy tables ?

I have some prompt in my BW that are filtering hierarchy nodes in the query and I want to replicate the same behaviour in Datashpere 

Thanks for all guidance

entry.title: Is there a way to inherit authorization setting from BW to Datashpere ?
entry.content:
Hey Specs, 

I am replicating a SAP  Bex query from BW into SapDatashpere

My only issue is that there are some authorization relevant objects in my query for some users.

My question is there a way to inherit to original authorization settings for an infoobject that is transfered to datashpere ?

entry.title: Unable to install Data sphere Agent
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

For the last two days, I have been trying to install the SAP Datasphere Agent but have been unable to install/configure it properly. I know this sounds basic, but despite trying all the documents, I am still facing issues. Can someone guide me?

I have observed that if I choose the option "Valid" as true, I need to provide specific values:

Spoiler
Enter Use Proxy Server [false]: Valid options: true|false
false
Enter Use X509 Client Certificate for Agent Messaging User [false]: Valid options: true|false
false

Thank you in advance.

Priaynka

 

Hi have tried once again still getting the same error Your support Much appreciated

entry.title: Timelines for Implementation of BW to DataSphere, Bw to BW4HANA and BW4HANA to Datasphere?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We’re planning to transition our SAP Business Warehouse (BW) system to SAP Datasphere, and we’re also considering moving to SAP BW/4HANA and BW4HANA to DataSphere. We have a total of 450 BW extractors and 100 Advanced DataStore Objects (ADSO). Could anyone share insights or timelines for implementing these transitions? Any best practices, conversion approaches, or readiness checks would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Need Blob to text conversion in Data Sphere
entry.content:
Hi folks,

I have table in S/4 hana STXl to store the long text for all other tables which i am using it in Data sphere to get text but i am failing to convert the clustd value  TO_CHAR(TO_NCLOB(TO_BINARY('FF06020102028000343130330000000063010000121F9D0232663E060606461E20C1C0CA80058430F8307832F831B832AC85A85C05166601538C1CEB2082FBA0', 'HEX'))) text but it was giving an error for conversion.

 

 

Could anyone please help me here to convert this in data sphere or any suggestion would be helpful.

entry.title: Help Needed: Converting String to Date in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
I am currently working on loading data from a CDS view in SAP S/4HANA to SAP Datasphere. CDS view includes a field RequestedDeliveryDate which is causing a data type mismatch error because it is being interpreted as a string instead of a date.

Thank you for your assistance

Best regards,

Priyanka

entry.title: Data Access Control in Modeler in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi all,


Is it possible to have Data Access Control for data from model on SAC with same approach as we have in Datasphere? Model on SAC is with imported data not via live connection.


I have concept of authorization based on dimensions with so many values and there is so many users. For example, each Project Manager should see data only for one or more Projects, but dimension Project has over 5000 values and it's not possible to maintain it manually like on the screenshot below.

And this is not only issue, but many Users have more than one dimension that his authorizations are based on. Is it possible to implement this concept of data access control in SAC? Below is preview of authorization concept from Datasphere.

Thanks in advance!
